completed_tasks.name: Resolution/dispute UI + LLM buttons + settings page
Unified market status colors + dispute button
Active positions include non-closed + dispute always visible
Hide Place Bet when not open + multichoice resolution error
Tier 2.5 review window: accept/dispute voting + migration 011

blockers.description: Tier 2.5 mechanic needs browser verification before 05-06 runs
blockers.workaround: Ask user to confirm testing done

human_actions_pending.action: Test Tier 2.5: proposer submits resolution, participant sees Accept/Dispute buttons, dispute vote triggers threshold check
human_actions_pending.context: New mechanic implemented this session as hotfix-10. Also verify market card colors, Place Bet hidden on non-open markets, multichoice resolution.

decisions.decision: Tier 2.5 review window: >10% dispute threshold triggers Tier 3
ResolutionReview table (migration 011) for per-user votes during proposer_resolved window
Proposer blocked from voting on own resolution (403)
Accept free; dispute costs 1 BP, requires active position
Celery _finalize_uncontested_resolutions auto-closes after 48h if no Dispute record

decisions.rationale: Positions on pending_resolution/proposer_resolved/disputed must show in active list

decisions.decision: Market card colors: white/red-yellow/blue/violet/green by status

next_action: Confirm Tier 2.5 testing done, then /clear and run /gsd:execute-phase 05 for plan 05-06
context_notes: Entire session was user testing + hotfixes. Biggest change: Tier 2.5 collective voting mechanic replaces single-user dispute. 05-06 is small (socket events + navbar link). After 05-06 complete, run /gsd:verify-work for Phase 5.
